description: Full server health monitoring: CPU, RAM, Disk, Processes, SMART drive health, CPU hardware faults (MCE), ECC RAM errors, and container CVEs via Trivy.

panels.title: Drive SMART Health
panels.description: SMART overall health per drive. 1=PASSED, 0=FAILED. Uses smartctl_device_smart_passed metric.

panels.title: Reallocated Sectors
panels.description: Bad sectors reallocated to spare area. sda=Seagate IronWolf HDD, sdb=Samsung SSD 870 QVO. Any non-zero value is a warning sign.

panels.title: Pending Bad Sectors
panels.description: Sectors that failed to read, waiting reallocation. Even 1 is a critical sign of imminent failure.

panels.title: CPU Machine Check Exceptions
panels.description: Hardware faults reported by the CPU via MCE. Any non-zero value indicates a faulty CPU, cache, or bus. Requires rasdaemon on host.

panels.title: ECC RAM Uncorrectable Errors
panels.description: Multi-bit RAM errors that could NOT be corrected. Any value means RAM has failed and must be replaced. Requires ECC RAM.

panels.title: ECC RAM Correctable Errors (1h)
panels.description: Single-bit errors corrected by ECC. A few is normal; a rising count indicates degrading RAM.

panels.title: CPU Temperature
panels.description: CPU package temperature per socket. You have 2 sockets (platform_coretemp_0 and platform_coretemp_1). Shows Package id 0 sensor (temp1) which is the overall socket temperature.

panels.title: Drive Temperature
panels.description: Drive temperatures via smartctl_device_temperature. sda=Seagate IronWolf HDD, sdb=Samsung 870 QVO SSD.

panels.title: Temperature History
panels.description: Historical CPU and drive temperatures over time.

panels.title: CPU Usage by Mode
panels.description: Breakdown of CPU time across user, system, iowait, steal, etc.

panels.title: Disk Space Usage
panels.description: Used vs available per mount point. Red = >90% full.

panels.title: Disk I/O Utilisation (% busy)
panels.description: How much time each device is busy doing I/O. >80% sustained = bottleneck.

panels.title: Disk I/O Wait Time
panels.description: Average time per I/O operation. High values = slow drive or overloaded.

panels.title: Exporter Status
panels.description: UP = exporter is reachable and Prometheus is scraping it. DOWN = no data will appear in process panels.

panels.title: Top Processes — CPU Usage History
panels.description: Per-process CPU usage over time. Shows processes using the most CPU.

panels.title: Top Processes — Memory (RSS) History
panels.description: Resident Set Size (physical RAM) per process over time.

panels.title: Top Processes — Disk Read I/O
panels.description: Per-process disk read throughput history.

panels.title: Top Processes — Disk Write I/O
panels.description: Per-process disk write throughput history.

panels.title: Process Snapshot Table (sorted by CPU)
panels.description: Current snapshot of all tracked processes with CPU, memory, I/O, and thread count.

panels.title: Vulnerability Details by Image
panels.description: Full CVE list from Trivy scans, sorted by severity.

title: Server Health — Full Stack
